mapper.select: SELECT 'menu' SEARCH_TYPE , MB.MENU_SEQ -- 메뉴일련번호 long , MB.MENU_CODE -- 메뉴코드 , MB.MENU_NM -- 메뉴명(색인) , MB.GROUP_KEY -- 그룹키 --, PRNTS_KEY -- 부모키 , CASE WHEN MB.DEPTH_KEY = '1' THEN MB.MENU_NM WHEN MB.DEPTH_KEY = '2' THEN (B.MENU_NM || ' > ' || MB.MENU_NM ) ELSE (C.MENU_NM || ' > ' || B.MENU_NM || ' > ' || MB.MENU_NM ) END AS PRNTS_KEY , MB.DEPTH_KEY -- DEPTH키 long , MB.URL_ADR -- URL , MB.REP_URL_SEQ -- URL일련번호 , MB.CHATBOT_TIP_SBST -- 챗봇말풍선내용(색인) , MB.MENU_DESC -- 메뉴설명(색인) , MB.ATT_YN -- 새창여부 , MB.SORT_KEY --, MENU_OUTPUT_CD FROM NMCP_USER_MENU_BAS MB LEFT OUTER JOIN NMCP_USER_MENU_BAS B ON MB.PRNTS_KEY = B.MENU_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN NMCP_USER_MENU_BAS C ON B.PRNTS_KEY = C.MENU_CODE WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(MB.PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(MB.PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) AND MB.USE_YN = 'Y' AND MB.STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND MB.ACES_ALWD_YN = 'Y' AND MB.CNTPNT_CD = 'F' AND MB.MENU_OUTPUT_CD IN ('MENUPC001','MENUMO001') ORDER BY MB.SORT_KEY

SELECT BAS.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ -- 요금제안내일련번호 , BAS.RATE_DIV_CD -- 휴대폰/유심요금제구분 , BAS.RATE_ADSVC_NM -- 요금제부가서비스명(색인) , BAS.RATE_ADSVC_APD_NM -- 요금제부가서비스추가명(색인) , BAS.RATE_ADSVC_BAS_DESC -- 요금제부가서비스기본설명(색인) , BAS.MM_BAS_AMT_DESC -- 월기본금액설명(색인) , BAS.MM_BAS_AMT_VAT_DESC -- 월기본금액VAT(포함)설명(색인) , BAS.PROMOTION_AMT_DESC -- 프로모션요금설명(색인) , BAS.PROMOTION_AMT_VAT_DESC -- 프로모션요금VAT(포함)설명(색인) , CTG.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_CD -- 카테고리코드 , CTG.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_NM -- 요금제부가서비스카테고리명(색인) , CTG.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_BAS_DESC -- 요금제부가서비스카테고리기본설명(색인) , CTG.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_DTL_DESC -- 요금제부가서비스카테고리상세설명(색인) , REL.RATE_ADSVC_PROD_REL_SEQ -- 요금제부가서비스상품관계일련번호 , REL.RATE_ADSVC_CD -- 요금제부가서비스코드 , DTL.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD -- 요금제부가서비스항목코드 , CASE WHEN DTL.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD = 'RATE199' THEN DTL.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM ELSE (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'CO0004' AND DTL_CD = DTL.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD) END AS RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM1 -- 요금제부가서비스항목명(색인) , DTL.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_SBST -- 요금제부가서비스항목내용(색인) , BNF.RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_ITEM_CD -- 요금제부가서비스혜택항목코드 , (SELECT CD.DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL CD WHERE CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'CO0003' AND CD.DTL_CD = BNF.RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_ITEM_CD) AS RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM2 -- 요금제부가서비스항목명(색인) , BNF.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_DESC -- 요금제부가서비스항목설명(색인) , BNF.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_APD_DESC -- 요금제부가서비스항목추가설명(색인) , CTG.SORT_ODRG SORT_ODRG1 , CTGREL.SORT_ODRG SORT_ODRG2 FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_BAS BAS INNER JOIN NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_CTG_GDNC_REL CTGREL ON CTGREL.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = BAS.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ AND CTGREL.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(CTGREL.PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(CTGREL.PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) INNER JOIN NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_CTG_BAS CTG ON CTG.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_CD = CTGREL.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_CD AND CTG.CTG_OUTPUT_CD = 'CO00130001' AND CTG.RATE_ADSVC_DIV_CD = 'RATE' AND CTG.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(CTG.PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(CTG.PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) INNER JOIN NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_PROD_REL REL ON REL.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = BAS.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ AND REL.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(REL.PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(REL.PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_SBST FROM ( SELECT RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ ORDER BY RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_DTL_SEQ) AS RNK , RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_SBST FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_DTL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) ) WHERE RNK = 1 ) DTL ON DTL.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = BAS.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ, RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_ITEM_CD, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_DESC, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_APD_DESC FROM ( SELECT RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ ORDER BY RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_SEQ) AS RNK , RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ, RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_ITEM_CD, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_DESC, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_APD_DESC FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_GDNC_DTL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) ) WHERE RNK = 1 ) BNF ON BNF.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = BAS.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ WHERE BAS.RATE_ADSVC_DIV_CD = 'RATE' AND BAS.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(BAS.PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(BAS.PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) ORDER BY CTG.SORT_ODRG, CTGREL.SORT_ODRG

SELECT BAS.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ -- 요금제안내일련번호 , BAS.RATE_ADSVC_NM -- 요금제부가서비스명(색인) , BAS.RATE_ADSVC_APD_NM -- 요금제부가서비스추가명(색인) , BAS.RATE_ADSVC_BAS_DESC -- 요금제부가서비스기본설명(색인) , BAS.MM_BAS_AMT_DESC -- 월기본금액설명(색인) , BAS.MM_BAS_AMT_VAT_DESC -- 월기본금액VAT(포함)설명(색인) , BAS.PROMOTION_AMT_DESC -- 프로모션요금설명(색인) , BAS.PROMOTION_AMT_VAT_DESC -- 프로모션요금VAT(포함)설명(색인) , CTG.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_CD -- 카테고리코드 , CTG.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_NM -- 요금제부가서비스카테고리명(색인) , CTG.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_BAS_DESC -- 요금제부가서비스카테고리기본설명(색인) , CTG.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_DTL_DESC -- 요금제부가서비스카테고리상세설명(색인) --, CTG.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_IMG_NM -- 요금제부가서비스카테고리이미지명 -- 추후 추가 , REL.RATE_ADSVC_PROD_REL_SEQ -- 요금제부가서비스상품관계일련번호 , REL.RATE_ADSVC_CD -- 요금제부가서비스코드 , DTL.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD -- 요금제부가서비스항목코드 , CASE WHEN DTL.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD = 'RATE199' THEN DTL.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM ELSE (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'CO0005' AND DTL_CD = DTL.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD) END AS RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM -- 요금제부가서비스항목명(색인) , DTL.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_SBST -- 요금제부가서비스항목내용(색인) , CTG.SORT_ODRG SORT_ODRG1 , CTGREL.SORT_ODRG SORT_ODRG2 FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_BAS BAS INNER JOIN NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_CTG_GDNC_REL CTGREL ON CTGREL.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = BAS.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ AND CTGREL.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(CTGREL.PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(CTGREL.PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) INNER JOIN NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_CTG_BAS CTG ON CTG.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_CD = CTGREL.RATE_ADSVC_CTG_CD AND CTG.CTG_OUTPUT_CD = 'CO00130001' AND CTG.RATE_ADSVC_DIV_CD = 'ADDSV' AND CTG.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(CTG.PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(CTG.PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT RATE_ADSVC_PROD_REL_SEQ, RATE_ADSVC_CD, RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ FROM ( SELECT RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ ORDER BY RATE_ADSVC_PROD_REL_SEQ ) AS RNK , RATE_ADSVC_PROD_REL_SEQ, RATE_ADSVC_CD, RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_PROD_REL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) ) WHERE RNK = 1 ) REL ON REL.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = BAS.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_SBST FROM ( SELECT RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ ORDER BY RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_DTL_SEQ) AS RNK , RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM, RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_SBST FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_DTL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) ) WHERE RNK = 1 ) DTL ON DTL.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = BAS.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ WHERE BAS.RATE_ADSVC_DIV_CD = 'ADDSV' AND BAS.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN RPAD(BAS.PSTNG_START_DATE, 8) AND RPAD(BAS.PSTNG_END_DATE, 8) ORDER BY CTG.SORT_ODRG, CTGREL.SORT_ODRG

SELECT SBST_CTG -- 게시물카테고리 , SBST_SUB_CTG_CD -- 서브카테고리코드 , CD.DTL_CD_NM -- 카테고리명(색인) , BOARD_SEQ -- 게시물인련번호 , BOARD_SUBJECT -- 게시물제목(색인) , BOARD_CONTENTS -- 게시물내용(색인) , BOARD_HIT_CNT -- 조회수 FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS BAS LEFT OUTER JOIN NMCP_CD_DTL CD ON CD_GROUP_ID = 'FAQB' AND CD.DTL_CD = BAS.SBST_CTG WHERE BOARD_CTG_SEQ = '57' AND VIEW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BOARD_HIT_CNT DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NMCP_SEARCH_PPLR_WORD_BAS WHERE CRET_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_SEARCH_PPLR_WORD_BAS ( CRET_DATE --등록일자[일자별 30개 관리] , SEARCH_WORD --검색어 , SEARCH_WORD_RANK --검색순위[1~30] , SEARCH_REPEAT_CNT --검색횟수 , SEARCH_RISE_NVAL --전일기준상승수치[-30 ~ 30] , CRET_ID --시스템등록아이디 , CRET_DT --시스템등록일시 , AMD_ID --시스템수정아이디 , AMD_DT --시스템수정일시 ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REG_DT , A.SEARCH_WORD , A.SRARCH_RANK , A.SEARCH_CNT , ( NVL(B.SEARCH_WORD_RANK, 31) - A.SRARCH_RANK ) AS SEARCH_UP_NVAL , 'admin' , SYSDATE , 'admin' , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT SEARCH_WORD , SEARCH_CNT , ROWNUM AS SRARCH_RANK FROM ( SELECT SEARCH_WORD , COUNT(1) AS SEARCH_CNT FROM NMCP_SEARCH_TXN -- 검색어 이력 WHERE CRET_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 7, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') -- 전일~1주일 AND SEARCH_RSLT_CASCNT > 0 GROUP BY SEARCH_WORD ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 30 ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SEARCH_WORD -- 검색어 , SEARCH_WORD_RANK -- 검색순위[1~30] FROM NMCP_SEARCH_PPLR_WORD_BAS G -- 인기검색어관리 WHERE CRET_DATE = (SELECT MAX(CRET_DATE) FROM NMCP_SEARCH_PPLR_WORD_BAS WHERE CRET_DATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') ) ) B ON B.SEARCH_WORD = A.SEARCH_WORD ORDER BY A.SRARCH_RANK
